chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Revision Application No.S-34 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Non-Prosecution 24-10-2024 Syed Tanveer Abbas Shah, Advocate for applicant. **** Learned counsel has filed statement for withdrawal of his Vakalatnama. On the last date of hearing, none was present on behalf of the applicant; however, in the interest of justice matter was adjourned for today. Today, Vakalatnama has been withdrawn by counsel and applicant is not in attendance. Under such circumstances, this Crl. Revision Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
